features.name: wizard-spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Maintain a spellbook, prepare arcane tools from it, and solve problems through the broadest magical list in the game.
features.rules_summary: Maintain a spellbook, prepare arcane tools from it, and solve problems through the broadest magical list in the game.

features.name: wizard-arcane-recovery
features.recovery: You can use this once per day after finishing a Short Rest.
features.safe_summary: Restore part of your spell economy during a short rest so the wizard can stay useful across a full adventuring day.
features.rules_summary: Restore part of your spell economy during a short rest so the wizard can stay useful across a full adventuring day.

features.name: wizard-scholar
features.safe_summary: Your training is not just magical talent — it is practiced, studied expertise in arcane knowledge and careful problem solving.
features.rules_summary: Your training is not just magical talent — it is practiced, studied expertise in arcane knowledge and careful problem solving.

features.name: wizard-arcane-tradition-subclass
features.safe_summary: Your chosen school or specialty changes the shape of your wizardry and the kinds of magical advantages you build around.
features.rules_summary: Your chosen school or specialty changes the shape of your wizardry and the kinds of magical advantages you build around.

features.name: wizard-memorize-spell
features.safe_summary: Reconfigure part of your prepared toolkit more flexibly than most casters, keeping the wizard adaptable between problems.
features.rules_summary: Reconfigure part of your prepared toolkit more flexibly than most casters, keeping the wizard adaptable between problems.

features.name: wizard-cantrip-formulas
features.safe_summary: Your basic magical routines become easier to swap and refine so your fallback toolkit stays useful.
features.rules_summary: Your basic magical routines become easier to swap and refine so your fallback toolkit stays useful.

features.name: wizard-spell-mastery
features.safe_summary: Choose signature lower-level spells that become part of your permanent operating rhythm instead of your precious daily budget.
features.rules_summary: Choose signature lower-level spells that become part of your permanent operating rhythm instead of your precious daily budget.

features.name: wizard-signature-spells
features.safe_summary: Your most iconic prepared spells become effortless enough that they define how this wizard approaches every serious adventuring day.
features.rules_summary: Your most iconic prepared spells become effortless enough that they define how this wizard approaches every serious adventuring day.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-2
features.safe_summary: You can now prepare and cast 2nd-level wizard spells.
features.rules_summary: You can now prepare and cast 2nd-level wizard spells.

features.name: wizard-subclass-feature-6
features.safe_summary: Your Arcane Tradition grants its first advanced specialization feature.
features.rules_summary: Your Arcane Tradition grants its first advanced specialization feature.

features.name: wizard-ability-score-improvement-4
features.safe_summary: Increase Intelligence or take a feat to sharpen your arcane toolkit.
features.rules_summary: Increase Intelligence or take a feat to sharpen your arcane toolkit.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-3
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 3rd-level wizard spells and major battlefield swing options.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 3rd-level wizard spells and major battlefield swing options.

features.name: wizard-cantrips-known-4
features.safe_summary: Learn a fourth cantrip to broaden your at-will magical coverage.
features.rules_summary: Learn a fourth cantrip to broaden your at-will magical coverage.

features.name: wizard-subclass-feature-10
features.safe_summary: Your Arcane Tradition deepens with a high-impact specialist feature.
features.rules_summary: Your Arcane Tradition deepens with a high-impact specialist feature.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-4
features.safe_summary: You can now cast 4th-level wizard spells.
features.rules_summary: You can now cast 4th-level wizard spells.

features.name: wizard-ability-score-improvement-8
features.safe_summary: Another ASI/feat choice to improve spell reliability or durability.
features.rules_summary: Another ASI/feat choice to improve spell reliability or durability.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-5
features.safe_summary: You gain 5th-level spell access and premier midgame arcane effects.
features.rules_summary: You gain 5th-level spell access and premier midgame arcane effects.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-6
features.safe_summary: You can cast 6th-level spells, entering high-tier arcane play.
features.rules_summary: You can cast 6th-level spells, entering high-tier arcane play.

features.name: wizard-ability-score-improvement-12
features.safe_summary: Late-tier ASI/feat choice for endgame spellcasting stability.
features.rules_summary: Late-tier ASI/feat choice for endgame spellcasting stability.

features.name: wizard-subclass-feature-14
features.safe_summary: Your Arcane Tradition unlocks its capstone specialization feature.
features.rules_summary: Your Arcane Tradition unlocks its capstone specialization feature.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-7
features.safe_summary: You can now cast 7th-level wizard spells.
features.rules_summary: You can now cast 7th-level wizard spells.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-8
features.safe_summary: You gain access to 8th-level wizard spells.
features.rules_summary: You gain access to 8th-level wizard spells.

features.name: wizard-ability-score-improvement-16
features.safe_summary: Penultimate ASI/feat to finish your endgame wizard build.
features.rules_summary: Penultimate ASI/feat to finish your endgame wizard build.

features.name: wizard-spell-level-9
features.safe_summary: You can cast 9th-level wizard spells, the peak of arcane power.
features.rules_summary: You can cast 9th-level wizard spells, the peak of arcane power.

features.name: wizard-cantrips-known-5
features.safe_summary: Learn a fifth cantrip for broader at-will utility and damage profiles.
features.rules_summary: Learn a fifth cantrip for broader at-will utility and damage profiles.

features.name: wizard-epic-boon
features.safe_summary: Gain an Epic Boon for a mythic-tier post-cap progression reward.
features.rules_summary: Gain an Epic Boon for a mythic-tier post-cap progression reward.

features.name: Spellbook
features.safe_summary: Spellbook is tracked as a Wizard feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content

features.safe_summary: Arcane Recovery is tracked as a Wizard feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content
